name: meteor
title: Meteor
description: High-speed download manager. Download files, torrents, and magnet links with multi-connection acceleration, powered by aria2c.
author: mvrck-dev

commands.name: tasks
commands.title: Tasks
commands.description: Dashboard showing active, waiting, paused, and stopped downloads.

commands.name: add-download
commands.title: Add Download
commands.description: Queue a new download via URL, HTTP, FTP, or Magnet link.

commands.name: download-from-torrent
commands.title: Download from Torrent
commands.description: Load a local .torrent file and queue it in aria2.

commands.name: configuration
commands.title: Configuration
commands.description: Configure download directory, speed limits, BitTorrent settings, and more.

preferences.name: rpcPort
preferences.title: Aria2 RPC Port
preferences.description: Port on which the local or remote aria2c RPC server runs (default: 6800).

preferences.name: rpcSecret
preferences.title: RPC Secret Token
preferences.description: Secret token configured in aria2.conf (leave blank if none).

preferences.name: autoStartDaemon
preferences.title: Auto-Start Daemon
preferences.description: Automatically start a local background aria2c daemon if none is detected on the configured port.
preferences.label: Enable local aria2c auto-start

preferences.name: checkCertificate
preferences.title: Verify SSL Certificates
preferences.description: Verify HTTPS certificates. Disable if you encounter SSL/TLS handshake failures on some servers.
preferences.label: Verify SSL/TLS certificates

preferences.name: autoUpdate
preferences.title: Automatic Updates
preferences.description: Enable automatic background updates for this extension from the Raycast Store.
preferences.label: Enable automatic updates
